bird.name: Waller's starling
bird.summary: Waller's starling (Onychognathus walleri) is a species of starling in the family Sturnidae. It is native to the Western High Plateau and Bi…

locations.name: 巴門達高原
locations.summary: 巴門達高原是非洲中西部國家喀麥隆的高原，受赤道多雨氣候影響，每年平均降雨量1,000至2,000毫米，是薩納加河主要支流的發源地。

locations.name: Albertine Rift montane forests

locations.name: Eastern Arc forests
locations.summary: The Eastern Arc forests is a montane tropical moist forest ecoregion of eastern Africa.

relations.subject: Waller's starling
relations.evidence: It is native to the Western High Plateau and Bioko, the Albertine Rift montane forests, the East African montane forests and the Eastern Arc forests
